title: mikania troyana
intro: Mikania troyana, also known as Mayan or Mexican creepers, is a type of flowering vine native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mikania troyana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Mikania troyana often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
